name: metacognitive-guard
description: Guard against overconfidence and hallucination with a metacognition stack: hooks (epistemic-guard on edits, commit-integrity on git commit, objective-drift watch, ralph-loop), commands for deep four-phase analysis, competing arch-vs-impl reviewers, and epistemic/pre-completion verification checkpoints, plus a background deep-think-partner agent and CI scripts checked against a blackboard/assertions.yaml ground truth. Use before claiming 'done', when answering stale version/date/'current' questions, before committing, or on architecture and stuck-debugging calls that deserve adversarial review.
